tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal dysfunction. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, high protein, bilirubin, and ketones) further support renal impairment and possible hepatic involvement. Low HbA1c may indicate recent changes in glucose metabolism. Recommend further nephrological and hepatic evaluation and correlation with clinical findings.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Nonproliferative retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
